benchmarks.liquidity_target: > 70% of searches result in a transaction

best_practices: Solve the cold-start problem by seeding supply before demand (invite sellers first)
Build trust and safety infrastructure before scaling (reviews, ID verification)
Constrain geography or category at launch — do not try to be everything everywhere
Track liquidity per category/city — not just aggregate GMV
Reduce friction to first transaction with money-back guarantee or escrow
Automate seller onboarding with guided checklist and profile completeness score
Implement dispute resolution workflow before first 100 transactions
Use network effects marketing — 'X people near you are selling Y'
common_risks: Chicken-and-egg problem — supply without demand or demand without supply
Disintermediation — buyers and sellers transact off-platform after first meeting
Trust failure — single fraud or safety incident can destroy reputation at scale
Thin liquidity in long-tail categories (most GMV comes from top 5% of categories)
Seller concentration risk — top 10 sellers generating > 50% of GMV
Payment fraud at scale — chargeback rates exceeding payment processor thresholds
Regulatory exposure in financial (money transmission) or gig economy contexts
growth_patterns: Geographic expansion — dominate one city/region before expanding
Category expansion — master one vertical before adjacent verticals
Supply-side seeding — outbound recruit top sellers with white-glove onboarding
Demand-side SEO — every listing is a long-tail landing page
Referral programs for both buyers and sellers
Enterprise/B2B channel — sell to businesses as buyers or sellers
network_effects: Direct network effects: more buyers attract more sellers and vice versa
Data network effects: more transactions improve matching algorithm quality
Social proof: reviews and ratings reduce buyer uncertainty at scale
Geographic density: local density creates winner-take-all dynamics per metro area
trust_and_safety: ID verification for sellers before first transaction
Buyer review system with fraud detection on reviews
Escrow or platform-held payments before release
Dispute resolution with human escalation path
Content moderation on listings (prohibited items policy)
Seller performance metrics (response time, cancellation rate, ratings)
recommended_integrations: Stripe Connect — split payments, seller payouts, escrow
Algolia — listing search with relevance ranking
Cloudinary — listing image processing and CDN
Twilio — buyer/seller messaging with number masking
